email.subject: Payroll variance report doubles gross pay totals
email.body: The payroll variance report and gross-to-net export both show doubled tax totals for salaried employees. Please investigate the reconciliation logic.

name: similar portal concepts but hr portal is correct

email.subject: New hires cannot open the onboarding checklist
email.body: The employee portal lets new hires sign in, but the onboarding checklist and benefits enrollment tiles stay blank for managers approving first-day setup.

name: weak context where sender domain should matter

email.subject: Queue is stuck again
email.body: The queue stopped moving after lunch and the policy packets are still waiting for review. Please take a look.

name: ambiguous workflow wording with one intended epic

email.subject: Approval routing skips the second reviewer
email.body: Policy documents are jumping from the first approver straight to signoff, so the second review step in the approval workflow is being skipped.
